title: Assessment – different methods of program evaluation
author: Wivel, Helle
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The Engineering College of Aarhus changed the overall evaluation procedure from
a traditional questionnaire approach, to a procedure that ensured keeping the
courses, and learning activities vital and dynamic. The main purpose for this
change was a profound wish to emphasise the teacher's ongoing work to
elaborate on course descriptions and learning objectives. The evaluations
should maintain focus on how teaching methods contribute to optimize student
learning and engagement, and to initiate a dialog with students to get them
more active in the evaluation procedure.

keywords: Evaluating the impact of CDIO programs
Student involvement in the development of engineering education
